recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: New York, United HeroeZ
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Action, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Marinette’s class is headed to New York, the city of superheroes, for French-American Friendship Week.

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: Hey Arnold! The Jungle Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Animation, Adventure, TV Movie, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When their trip to San Lorenzo takes a turn for the worst, Arnold and his classmate’s only hope of getting home is retracing the dangerous path that led to Arnold's parents' disappearance.

recommendations.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Family, Comedy, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Grizz, Panda, and Ice Bear's love of food trucks and viral videos get out of hand, the brothers are now chased away from their home and embark on a trip to Canada, where they can live in peace.
